title: Dikkie Dik en de Verdwenen Knuffel
original_title: Dikkie Dik en de verdwenen knuffel
overview: Tummy Tom’s favourite toy is Bear. One evening, when Tummy Tom is sleeping, Bear goes missing. Tummy Tom and his best friend Cat Mouse start looking in and around the house. But in order to find Bear, they decide to leave their garden and discover a new world with new friends. Together, they manage to find Bear.
